title: Player Locator
description: Gives you the location of nearby players!
body:
# Gives you the location of nearby players!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YUNfeUFf/images/2dfa63c5cad19f88e8a28423ae7561e088b1e5d0.png)

# Adds text in the top right corner showing:
- Names
- Heads
- Coordinates
- Distance
- Direction

**... Of players in nearby loaded chunks.**

There is also a ```/playerlocator toggle``` command to toggle the mod on and off, just incase.
